evaluations.prompt: Check if my HuggingFace credentials are configured correctly without making any changes.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs hf_init.py with --validate-only flag. It verifies env vars and API connectivity but does NOT create dataset folders or upload a dataset card.

evaluations.prompt: I put my HUGGING_FACE_TOKEN in my .env file. Is that ok?
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent explicitly warns that HUGGING_FACE_TOKEN must NOT be in .env (which may be committed). It instructs the user to add it to ~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc instead and remove it from .env immediately.

If any required env var (HUGGING_FACE_USERNAME, HUGGING_FACE_TOKEN, HUGGING_FACE_REPO, HUGGING_FACE_DATASET_PATH) is missing, init aborts immediately and reports each missing variable. It does NOT proceed with partial configuration.
